EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The host {event_src.host} detected an email message with size {object.value} bytes. The email message is blocked because the message size is exceeded
The host {event_src.host} detected an email message with a line size of {object.value} bytes. The email message is blocked because the line size is exceeded
The host {event_src.host} detected an email message with a header size of {object.value} bytes. The email message is blocked because the header size is exceeded
